mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO new_sales_work_20260510 ( order_number, platform, product_name_raw, product_id, quantity, product_total, unit_price, shipping_included, order_date ) VALUES
( #{item.orderNumber}, #{item.platform}, #{item.productNameRaw}, #{item.productId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.quantity}, #{item.productTotal}, #{item.unitPrice}, #{item.shippingIncluded}, #{item.orderDate} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE order_number = order_number

INSERT INTO new_sales_work_20260510 ( order_number, platform, product_name_raw, product_id, quantity, product_total, unit_price, shipping_included, order_date ) VALUES ( #{orderNumber}, #{platform}, #{productNameRaw}, #{productId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{quantity}, #{productTotal}, #{unitPrice}, #{shippingIncluded}, #{orderDate} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, product_name_raw AS productNameRaw, product_id AS productId, unit_price AS unitPrice, platform, shipping_included AS shippingIncluded, order_date AS orderDate FROM new_sales_work_20260510 WHERE product_id IS NULL ORDER BY id LIMIT 1

SELECT id, product_name_raw AS productNameRaw, product_id AS productId, unit_price AS unitPrice, platform, shipping_included AS shippingIncluded, order_date AS orderDate FROM new_sales_work_20260510 WHERE product_id IS NULL AND order_date = #{orderDate} ORDER BY id
